findings.message: New redis-exporter service added with no corresponding Prometheus scrape job. Metrics are exposed on :9121 but Prometheus is not configured to scrape them.
findings.suggestion: Add a scrape job for redis in infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml: - job_name: redis\n  static_configs:\n    - targets: ["redis-exporter:9121"]
